subject: Account Application Received
title: Application Confirmation
acknowledgment_message: Your application for an account on our service has been received and is now under review. Thank you for confirming your email address and for your interest in joining our community.
review_message: Our administrators will review your application shortly. You'll be notified via email when a decision has been made.
footer_text: This is an automated message, please do not reply to this email.
